method: Normalized Compression Distance: significand fractional part vs nearest rational (q<=100)

summary.interpretation: Mean NCD = 0.5199 (null = 0.5228). Physical constants are indistinguishable from small-denominator rationals compared to random reals. Expected: NCD ~0.95 for random reals; actual null mean confirms baseline.
